message:
Add OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions adapter

New provider "openai-compatible" for third-party services (Ollama, vLLM,
LiteLLM, etc.) that implement the standard /v1/chat/completions protocol.
Supports basic generate, streaming, and tool calling. Configured via
OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_BASE_URL and optional OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_API_KEY.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
